name: 3D Sine Wave Grid
description: A 10x10 grid of boxes animated with a 3D sine wave using jsLoop patches.

jsLoop.code: function jsLoop(ctx, state) { state = state || { t: 0, initialized: false }; var size = 10; var patches = []; if (!state.initialized) { var objects = []; for (var x = 0; x < size; x++) { for (var z = 0; z < size; z++) { objects.push({ id: 'cube_' + x + '_' + z, type: 'Box', position: [x - size/2, 1, z - size/2], dimensions: [0.8, 0.8, 0.8], mass: 1, isStatic: true, color: '#3498db' }); } } state.initialized = true; return { state: state, addObjects: objects }; } for (var x = 0; x < size; x++) { for (var z = 0; z < size; z++) { var height = 1 + Math.sin(state.t + x*0.5 + z*0.5) * 1.5; var objId = 'cube_' + x + '_' + z; var objIndex = ctx.scene.objects.findIndex(function(o){ return o.id === objId; }); if (objIndex !== -1) { patches.push({ op: 'replace', path: '/objects/' + objIndex + '/position', value: [x - size/2, height, z - size/2] }); } } } state.t += 0.1; return { state: state, patches: patches }; }
